card.name: Troll Bombed
card.text: Troll Bombed deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: The D6
card.text: {T}: The next time target player would roll one or more dice this turn, instead they roll that many dice plus one and you choose one of those rolls to ignore. {2}, {T}, Discard a card: Draw a card. {4}, {T}, Discard an artifact card: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal an artifact card. Put that card into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Isaac Moriah
card.text: Starting item—The D6 (When this creature enters, you may search your library and/or graveyard for The D6 and put it into your hand. If you searched your library this way, shuffle.) Whenever an artifact you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on Isaac. This ability only triggers once each turn.

card.name: I Can See Forever
card.text: Look at the top six cards of your library, then put them back in any order. Draw a card.

card.name: Key Master
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice another artifact: Roll a d6. If the sacrificed artifact was a Key, repeat this process once. [b]1-3 [/b]| Scry 2. [b]4-5 [/b]| Scry 1, then draw a card. [b]6 [/b]| You may sacrifice this creature. If you sacrificed this creature this turn, you may put an artifact card from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Dople
card.text: You may have this creature enter as a copy of any creature on the battlefield, except it has "When this creature or another creature with the same name dies, draw a card."

card.name: Oh Crap
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, put two +1/+1 counters on enchanted creature. It becomes an Ooze in addition to its other types. Whenever an Ooze you control dies, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature.

card.name: The Bible
card.text: {T}: Choose one — • Destroy target Curse. • Target creature you control gains flying until end of turn. • Destroy target Boss and The Bible.

card.name: Bookworm
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, create a colorless Book artifact token with "{5}{U}, {T}: Draw a card. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each other artifact you control." Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 for each Book you control.

card.name: Curse of Tiny Hands
card.text: Enchant player Enchanted player's maximum hand size is two.

card.name: Book of the Dead
card.text: {T}: Exile target card from a graveyard. {3}{B}, {T}: Return target creature card in a graveyard that was put there from the battlefield this turn to the battlefield tapped under your control. It's a Skeleton in addition to its other types and has no abilities.

card.name: Box of Friends
card.text: {T}: Populate. The token created this way gains haste. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. (To populate, create a token that's a copy of a creature token you control.) {5}{R}, {T}: For each creature token you control, create a token that's a copy of it. Each token created this way gains haste. Sacrifice them at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Boss Rush
card.text: Whenever you cast a Boss spell, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a Boss card. Put that card into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. Boss spells you cast cost {3} less to cast. At the beginning of the end step, sacrifice this enchantment.

card.name: Spindown Dice
card.text: {T}, Discard a card: Choose greater or lesser. Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a card with greater mana value if you chose greater or lesser mana value if you chose lesser. Put that card into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: The Broken
card.text: Starting item—Spindown Dice (When this creature enters, you may search your library and/or graveyard for Spindown Dice and put it into your hand. If you searched your library this way, shuffle.) Whenever you draw your first card each turn, you may pay {R}. If you do, draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Lilith, Motherly Demon
card.text: Starting item—Box of Friends When Lilith enters, create a 1/1 black Demon Minion creature token. {BR}, {T}: Another target creature you control gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the number of Demons you control.

card.name: Satan
card.text: Flying, trample When Satan enters, if he wasn't cast, you lose 20 life. Whenever Satan becomes the target of a spell or ability, that spell or ability's controller loses the game.

card.name: Hornfel
card.text: Whenever Hornfel enters or deals combat damage to a player, create a Bomb token. (It's an artifact with "{2R}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: It deals 2 damage to any target.") Whenever you activate an ability that isn't a mana ability, if one or more Bombs were sacrificed to activate it, you may pay 1 life. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Baby Plum, Fly Friend
card.text: Flying, lifelink Each other Insect, Leech, Slug, and Worm you control enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Evil Twin
card.text: You may have this creature enter as a copy of any creature on the battlefield, except it has "{U}{B}, {T}: Destroy target creature with the same name as this creature."

card.name: A Sack!
card.text: Roll a d4. Repeat the following process X times, where X is the result. Roll a d20. [b]1-5 [/b]| Create a Treasure token. [b]6-10 [/b]| Create a Key token. [b]11-15 [/b]| Create a Bomb token. [b]16-18 [/b]| Create a Battery token. [b]19-20 [/b]| Draw a card.

card.name: Lazarus' Rags
card.text: Whenever a creature enters from a graveyard, you may return target Aura or Equipment from your graveyard or its owner's graveyard to the battlefield under your control attached to that creature.

card.name: D-Infinity
card.text: {4}, {T}: Choose one, X is the result of the die rolled. • Roll a d4. You draw X cards. • Roll a d6. You create X Key tokens. • Roll a d8. You create X Treasure tokens. • Roll a d10. Put X +1/+1 counters on a creature you control. • Roll a d12. You gain X life.

card.name: Key Token
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Tap or untap target nonland permanent. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Lazarus, the Returning
card.text: Starting item—Lazarus' Rags (When this creature enters, you may search your library and/or graveyard for Lazarus' Rags and put it into your hand. If you searched your library this way, shuffle.) Whenever Lazarus is dealt damage, create a Blood token. When Lazarus dies, you may sacrifice a Blood token. If you do, return him to the battlefield transformed under his owner's control. --- (Back): Lazarus, Risen

card.name: Lazarus, Risen
card.text: Lazarus' power is equal to the number of artifacts you control. Whenever Lazarus enters, attacks or is dealt damage, create a Blood token. --- (Front): Lazarus, the Returning

card.name: Delirium of Memories
card.text: As Delirium enters or attacks, exile a creature card from a graveyard with a memory counter on it. Then it becomes a copy of a random creature card in exile with a memory counter on it except it's 7/7, is a Boss in addition to its other types, and has this ability.

card.name: Battery Token
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. This mana can't be spent to cast creature spells. Whenever this token becomes tapped, you may sacrifice it. When you do, untap target artifact.
